title: 冬の祭典～原稿やらなきゃ～

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohh... The winter convention is right around the
corner, so why... just why?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Why is my script still a white void?! I have four
days left to submit this, or I'll miss out on the
early discount!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Urk... Have I lost my spark? My love for Umas
gushes like a geyser, but I can't pick up this pen...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Maybe I'll just reprint some of my old stuff on paper this time around...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian, are you positive you're eating well? Proper
nutrition is crucial for one's training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, whatever. I hope you haven't forgotten
about our plans after school.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, look at you trying to dodge the topic.
What a troublesome little sister you are. But to
answer your question, no, I haven't forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Then it's on, Big Sis. I want both of us... to come with our best.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You bet!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whoooa... This is good stuff!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Nature, Natuuure! Are you listening?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes. Simmer down. I'm all ears.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I wanna eat your meat and potato stew again! It
was super duper tasty!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
You're so good at cooking. You're like one of
those fancy chefs!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, you flatter me too much.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Fine, I'll fix you up a plate. I just can't win when
you give me that look.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Nnnngh! Yes, yes, yes! This is all golden!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Haaaah...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All of my many, many Umas... So much light... So
much love...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You know it. You know it well, Digitan. You just
can't help yourself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I can't... hold back...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I must make... a new comic.
